title: Ivanti Connect Secure Command Injection
description: A command injection vulnerability in web components of Ivanti Connect Secure and Ivanti Policy Secure allows an authenticated administrator to send specially crafted requests and execute arbitrary commands on the appliance. This vulnerability affects all supported versions.

title: PAN-OS GlobalProtect Command Injection
description: A command injection as a result of arbitrary file creation vulnerability in the GlobalProtect feature of Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software for specific PAN-OS versions and distinct feature configurations may enable an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges on the firewall.

title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Authentication Bypass
description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect 23.9.7 and prior are affected by an authentication bypass using an alternate path or channel vulnerability, which may allow an attacker direct access to confidential information or critical systems.

title: JetBrains TeamCity Authentication Bypass
description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2023.11.4 authentication bypass allowing to perform admin actions was possible. An unauthenticated attacker could leverage this to take complete control of TeamCity server including all projects, builds, agents, and artifacts.

title: PAN-OS Management Web Interface Authentication Bypass
description: An authentication bypass in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software enables an unauthenticated attacker with network access to the management web interface to gain PAN-OS administrator privileges to perform administrative actions, tamper with the configuration, or exploit other authenticated privilege escalation vulnerabilities.

title: Fortinet FortiManager Missing Authentication
description: A missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in FortiManager fgfmd daemon may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted requests. Reports have indicated this vulnerability is being exploited in the wild.

title: OpenSSH regreSSHion Remote Code Execution
description: A signal handler race condition was found in OpenSSH server (sshd), where a client does not authenticate within LoginGraceTime seconds (120 by default), then sshd SIGALRM handler is called asynchronously. This could potentially lead to remote code execution on glibc-based Linux systems.

title: Windows Remote Desktop Licensing Service RCE
description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Windows Remote Desktop Licensing Service due to a heap-based buffer overflow. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit this by sending specially crafted requests to the RDL service. Successful exploitation could result in arbitrary code execution on the target server.

title: PHP CGI Argument Injection
description: In PHP versions prior to certain patch levels, when using Apache and PHP-CGI on Windows, a specific character sequence in the URL can be used to bypass protections against argument injection, allowing an attacker to pass options to the PHP binary being run. This entails remote code execution on the target system.

title: Jenkins CLI Arbitrary File Read
description: Jenkins 2.441 and earlier, LTS 2.426.2 and earlier does not disable a feature of its CLI command parser that replaces an @ character followed by a file path in an argument with the file contents, allowing unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files on the Jenkins controller file system.

title: Ivanti EPM SQL Injection
description: An SQL injection vulnerability in the core server of Ivanti EPM 2022 SU5 and prior allows an unauthenticated attacker within the same network to execute arbitrary SQL commands that could lead to remote code execution.

title: Cleo Harmony Unrestricted File Upload RCE
description: In Cleo Harmony before 5.8.0.21, VLTrader before 5.8.0.21, and LexiCom before 5.8.0.21, there is an unrestricted file upload and download vulnerability that could lead to remote code execution. Attackers can upload arbitrary files to the server and execute them.

title: BeyondTrust PRA/RS Command Injection
description: A critical vulnerability has been discovered in BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS) products which can allow an unauthenticated attacker to inject commands that are run as a site user. This vulnerability is being actively exploited in the wild.

title: Veeam Backup & Replication Deserialization RCE
description: A deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability with a CVSS v3.1 score of 9.8 in Veeam Backup & Replication allows unauthenticated remote code execution. This vulnerability enables attackers to send specially crafted serialized objects to the server, leading to arbitrary code execution.

title: MOVEit Transfer Authentication Bypass
description: Improper authentication vulnerability in Progress MOVEit Transfer (SFTP module) can lead to authentication bypass. An attacker can exploit this vulnerability to gain unauthorized access to the MOVEit Transfer system without valid credentials.

title: SolarWinds Serv-U Path Traversal
description: SolarWinds Serv-U was susceptible to a directory traversal vulnerability that would allow access to read sensitive files on the host machine. This vulnerability requires authentication and can be exploited by an attacker with low privileges.

title: FortiOS SSL VPN Out-of-Bounds Write
description: An out-of-bound write vulnerability in FortiOS SSL VPN may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or command via specially crafted HTTP requests. This critical vulnerability has been observed being actively exploited by threat actors targeting government and enterprise networks.

title: GoAnywhere MFT Authentication Bypass
description: Authentication bypass in Fortra GoAnywhere MFT prior to version 7.4.1 allows an unauthorized user to create an admin user via the administration portal. This critical vulnerability allows complete takeover of the GoAnywhere MFT instance.

title: D-Link NAS Command Injection
description: A command injection vulnerability in D-Link NAS devices allows remote unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary shell commands via crafted HTTP GET requests. The vulnerability exists in the cgi_user_add function of the account management CGI script and affects end-of-life products.

title: PAN-OS Management Interface Privilege Escalation
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software allows a PAN-OS administrator with access to the management web interface to perform actions on the firewall with root privileges. This vulnerability is chained with CVE-2024-0012 in active attacks.
